prose:
**Furan frontier–orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF (2022.3), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
Geometry: user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (no relaxation; single-point calculation).
SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported.
HOMO = −6.3597638 eV, LUMO = −0.1024036 eV → **gap = 6.2573602 eV**

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpl8ryws4d/live.json
```

Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpl8ryws4d/live.json` (contains full orbitals and Koopmans data).
Log file (live output) is being written to `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory (you can `tail -f frontier_*.out`).
